texto: Stupidity and MadnessThe Tao is clear, yet this clarity requires you to sweep away all your clutter. At all times watch out for your own stupidity, be careful of how your mind jumps around. When nothing occurs to involve your mind, you return to true awareness. When unified mindfulness is purely real, you comprehend the great restoration. The ridiculous ones are those who try to cultivate quietude - as long as body and mind are unstable, it is madness to go into the mountains.
explicacao: Citação de Liu Yiming sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “Stupidity and MadnessThe Tao is clear, yet this clarity requires you to sweep away all your clutt…” articula reflexao, asceticism, complete-reality em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como termino e complete-reality.

frase_original: Stupidity and MadnessThe Tao is clear, yet this clarity requires you to sweep away all your clutter. At all times watch out for your own stupidity, be careful of how your mind jumps around. When nothing occurs to involve your mind, you return to true awareness. When unified mindfulness is purely real, you comprehend the great restoration. The ridiculous ones are those who try to cultivate quietude - as long as body and mind are unstable, it is madness to go into the mountains.

texto: Cut off entanglements.Get rid of anger and hatred.Do not be afraid of hard work.Tolerate ignominy and endure dishonor.Forgive people and defer to others.Take possessions lightly; take life seriously.View others and self as the same.Do whatever you can to be helpful.Practice developing virtue is the greatest priority; when achievement is great and practice profound, it moves heaven and earth.Ridiculous are the foolish ones who only profit themselves; with no achievement and little action, they dream of becoming immortals.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Liu Yiming sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. A afirmação “Cut off entanglements.Get rid of anger and hatred.Do not be afraid of hard work.Tolerate ignominy…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a motivacao, complete-reality, enlightenment, útil em momentos de termino e trabalho.
